notes: Transitions to Jab 2 as early as frame 7.

Reaches full charge at 51 frames. Max charge active frames are at 52-144 if released frame perfectly (93 active frames). Ending animation has 31 total frames if grounded or 36 when aerial.Jigglypuff is helpless if she does not land or grab an edge after a hit, but she will pass through shields.
Total frames includes 13 frames of hitlag. Active 1—2.
